---
title: "Summarise BUSCO Trees"
---

```{r check-btree-setup, include=FALSE}
f_write_log(fn_log=fn_log,
            msg=c("", "####################################",
                      "####         BUSCO Trees        ####",
                      "####################################"))

# output directories
dir_buscotree <- paste0(dir_busco, "busco_tree/")
if (!dir.exists(dir_buscotree)) {
    dir.create(dir_buscotree, recursive=T)
}

# input files
fn_prefix <- paste0(dir_check_summary, params$prefix)
fn_cor_summary <- paste0(fn_prefix, ".cor.sumtable")

# output files
fn_cf_summary <- paste0(fn_prefix, ".cf.sumtable")
```

```{r}
# open the input data.frame
df_cor_summary <- data.table::fread(fn_cor_summary)

# iterate over short-reads
for (read is ls_shortreads) {
    # output directory
    dir_output_read <- paste0(dir_buscotree, read, "/")

    # subset the data.frame
    df_cor_subset <- df_cor_summary[df_cor_summary$read==read,]

    # iterate over sets of BUSCO
    for (condition in c("all", "bias", "nonbias")) {
        # create output directories
        dir_output_read_condition <- paste0(dir_output_read, condition, "/")
        dir_output_read_condition_fasta <- paste0(dir_output_read_condition, "alignment/")
        dir_output_read_condition_trees <- paste0(dir_output_read_condition, "trees/")
        if (!all(dir.exists(dir_output_read_condition_fasta, dir_output_read_condition_trees))) {
            dir.create(dir_output_read_condition_fasta, recursive=T)
            dir.create(dir_output_read_condition_trees, recursive=T)
        }

        # list BUSCO
        ls_busco_condition <- df_cor_summary$busco
        if (condition == "bias") {
            ls_busco_condition <- df_cor_summary$busco[df_cor_summary$lm_p<0.05 | df_cor_summary$spearman_p<0.05,]
        } else if (condition == "nonbias") {
            ls_busco_condition <- df_cor_summary$busco[df_cor_summary$lm_p>=0.05 & df_cor_summary$spearman_p>=0.05,]
        }

        # output files
        fn_busco_condition_prefix <- paste0(dir_output_read_condition_trees, "all_busco")
        fn_busco_condition_treefile <- paste0(fn_busco_condition_prefix, ".treefile")
        fn_busco_condition_astral_treefile <- paste0(dir_output_read_condition_trees, "astral.treefile")
        fn_busco_condition_astral_log <- paste0(dir_output_read_condition_trees, "astral.log")

        # create doSNOW cluster
        nwcl <- makeCluster(params$thread)
        doSNOW::registerDoSNOW(nwcl)

        # iterate over all BUSCO
        foreach(busco = ls_busco_condition) %dopar% {
            # extract alignment
            fn_input <- paste0(dir_busco_tree, busco, "/", busco, "_aligned.fa")
            fn_output <- paste0(dir_output_read_condition_fasta, busco, ".fa")

            # extract headers
            ls_prefix_subset <- ls_prefix[grepl(paste0("^",read), ls_prefix)]
            ls_header <- c(ls_refseq, ls_prefix_subset)

            f_extract_fasta(fn_input, ls_header, fn_output)
        }

        stopCluster(nwcl)

        # run IQ-TREE2
        f_window_tree(dir_output_read_condition_fasta, fn_busco_condition_prefix, params$thread, params$exe_iqtree2)

        # run ASTRAL
        f_astral(fn_busco_condition_treefile, fn_busco_condition_astral_treefile, fn_busco_condition_astral_log, params$exe_astral)

        # calculate sCF and gCF
        f_calculate_cf(fn_busco_condition_treefile, fn_busco_condition_astral_treefile, dir_output_condition_fasta, params$thread, params$exe_iqtree2)

        # iterate over reference sequences
        dir_output_read_condition_ref <- paste0(dir_output_read_condition, "per_reference/")
        for (ref in ls_refseq) {
            dir_output_perref <- paste0(dir_output_read_condition_ref, ref, "/")
            dir_output_perref_fasta <- paste0(dir_output_read_condition, "alignment/")
            dir_output_perref_trees <- paste0(dir_output_read_condition, "trees/")
            if (!dir.exists(dir_output_perref)) {
                dir.create(dir_output_perref, recursive=T)
            }

            # output files
            fn_busco_perref_prefix <- paste0(dir_output_perref_trees, "all_busco")
            fn_busco_perref_treefile <- paste0(fn_busco_perref_prefix, ".treefile")
            fn_busco_perref_astral_treefile <- paste0(dir_output_perref_trees, "astral.treefile")
            fn_busco_perref_astral_log <- paste0(dir_output_perref_trees, "astral.log")

            # create doSNOW cluster
            nwcl <- makeCluster(params$thread)
            doSNOW::registerDoSNOW(nwcl)

            # iterate over all BUSCO
            foreach(busco = ls_busco_condition) %dopar% {
                # extract alignment
                fn_input <- paste0(dir_busco_tree, busco, "/", busco, "_aligned.fa")
                fn_output <- paste0(dir_output_read_condition_fasta, busco, ".fa")

                # extract headers
                ls_header <- c(ls_refseq, paste0(read,"--",ref))

                f_extract_fasta(fn_input, ls_header, fn_output)
            }

            stopCluster(nwcl)

            # run IQ-TREE2
            f_window_tree(dir_output_perref_fasta, fn_busco_perref_prefix, params$thread, params$exe_iqtree2)

            # run ASTRAL
            f_astral(fn_busco_perref_treefile, fn_busco_perref_astral_treefile, fn_busco_perref_astral_log, params$exe_astral)

            # calculate sCF and gCF
            f_calculate_cf(fn_busco_perref_treefile, fn_busco_perref_astral_treefile, dir_output_perref_fasta, params$thread, params$exe_iqtree2)
        }
    }    
}
```
